title: rubus chloophyllus
intro: Rubus chloophyllus, also known as the yellow raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus chloophyllus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing potential protection against certain cancers. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies in various forms, including dried leaves and extracts.
